text.title: RFC 7807 Implementation Examples
text.summary: FastAPI exception handler, ProblemDetail model, JSON schema, and contract test helper.

example.note: Content-Type is set explicitly. 5xx detail is static. traceId reads from W3C traceparent header.
Reusable assertion helper for contract tests. Checks content-type, status range, and schema.

text.reference: YAML JSON Schema for CI validation
